title: ArtifactWritten payload
description: Emitted (OPT-IN) when fs.write commits a file in record mode. Carries the file path + write measures so fs.read provenance mode can fold per-write intent into a file's mutation history without re-reading the working tree. The default fs.write does NOT emit — this is the write half of the write->read provenance loop. The artifact's entity reference lives in the envelope (entity_kind=artifact, entity_slug=absolute path); the write intent is carried in the event rationale.

file_path.description: Absolute path of the file written. Matched verbatim by fs.read provenance mode (json_extract(payload,'$.file_path')).

bytes_written.description: Byte length of the new file content.

line_count.description: Line count of the new file content (newline-terminated lines plus a trailing unterminated line).

created.description: True when the file did not exist before the write (a create rather than an overwrite).
